words.def: a location marked by an intense competition and struggle for survival
words.zh: n. 叢林, 雜亂的一堆, 弱肉強食的地方

words.def: either of two saclike respiratory organs in the chest of vertebrates; serves to remove carbon dioxide and provide oxygen to the blood
words.zh: n. 肺, 肺臟, 空地

words.def: a human limb; commonly used to refer to a whole limb but technically only the part of the limb between the knee and ankle
words.zh: n. 腿, 假腿, 路程
n. 訊息, 真相, 情報

words.def: a weapon that discharges a missile at high velocity (especially from a metal tube or barrel)
